Home use

The hyperbaric chamber,
at home.

The same certified chamber our clinic runs daily - in your home, on your schedule.

Get a quote View the models

The same chamber that runs in elite sport - and the one Bryan Johnson chose for his own setup.

NFL · NHL · Elite football · Rugby · Bryan Johnson
Ownership

How it feels to own one.

No appointments, no travel, no working around a clinic's schedule. The chamber sits in your home and runs on yours - before work, after training, or last thing at night. It becomes part of the day rather than something you have to make time for.

It is specified to sit properly in the space, as a considered piece of equipment.

Make it yours

Built to belong in your home.

The interior leather, the exterior finish, the detailing - specified to your home and to you. Your colours, a monogram, or no branding at all.

InteriorLeather, colour, trim
ExteriorRAL or automotive finish
DetailingMonogram, branding, or none
Explore the finishes
Installed worldwide

In homes like these.

HPO.TECH chambers are installed in private homes across North and South America, Europe, Middle East, Asia and Australasia. A few of them, below. Most HPO.TECH chambers are installed in the US, where we work with install and servicing teams run from Detroit, Michigan.

Michigan, USA
California, USA
Uppsala, Sweden
Dubai, UAE
Utah, USA
London, UK
The real thing

A real chamber, not a soft-shell.

Most chambers sold for the home are soft-shell bags that sit just above normal pressure. This is a rigid chamber that holds 2.0 to 2.4 ATA with a built-in oxygen supply, made and certified to the standards that apply to pressure equipment built for people. It is the same specification we run in the clinic.

See the science
Specification
Delivered pressure 2.0–2.4 ATA the real working range, not a soft-shell
ChamberRigid, certified
Oxygen supplyBIBS · 100% → 94%
Certification includesCE · PED · ASME
How it happens

From spec to running.

01

Specify

We work with you to assess your space and specify the right chamber for it - placement, access, and the structural and plant requirements.

02

Managed install

We manage the delivery & installation - shipping, customs, access into the property, and the finish.

03

Running

Commissioned, handed over, and backed by protocol guidance so it earns its place from the first session.

Handled across the UK, Europe, the US and beyond - with US install and servicing teams run from Detroit, Michigan.
What the research measured

The stamina your life demands.

In a blinded, placebo-controlled trial, a course at the dose our chambers deliver raised aerobic capacity - with enhanced mitochondria (the cell's own power plants) doing the work.

Hadanny et al., 2022 · Sports Medicine - Open
See the science
Why Thrive

A clinic owner. Not just a supplier.

David runs an active hyperbaric clinic in Bath, using the same chambers you would own. Whether you are buying for your own home or specifying for a client, his team handles everything from specification to handover - and you pay HPO.TECH directly, at the same price as going direct.

Talk to David Read the buying guide

Start with a conversation.

A direct discussion about your space, your goals and the right chamber for your home.
